'''Bezim''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. The native [[Bezim (species)|Bezim]] joined with the people of [[Junction V]], [[Delaluna]], and [[Vicondor/Legends|Vicondor]] to build the [[Station 88 Spaceport]]. This coalition of planets chose to remain loyal to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].{{Planet-stub}}
